parties.name: SANTANA, ZULEMA 84 EXETER STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Order Recognizing Change of Gender, and for Issuance of a New Birth Certificate of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioners Zulema Santana and Moises Flores were present in pro per, with the minor.
No Proof of Publication required.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor from Angel Jesus Flores, a/k/a Anjel Jesus, a/k/a Angel Flores, to Angel Itzel Flores Santana.

Decree Changing Name and Order Recognizing Change of Gender, and for Issuance of New Birth Certificate, was submitted to and signed by the Court.
